parsed_output.justification: Mitchell claims to be the Seer and states he saw 'two werewolves'. Since the Seer can look at two cards in the center, this implies that both Werewolf cards are in the center and not held by any player. Mitchell further encourages the group not to vote anyone out, stating they are all on the same team. There is no contradictory evidence from Justin or Paul to suggest a Werewolf is among the players.
